features.name: Internal Disinfection
features.description: Disinfectation of seats, dashboard, steering wheel, gear stick, hand break, door sides, handles and roof for the safety of your loved ones

features.name: Water Efficient Washing
features.description: proper upper body wash, tyres, headlights and rubber mats with water to make it shine like a star

features.name: Upper body Microfibre Cloth Cleaning
features.description: complete upper body cleaning with a microfibre cloth so dust wont settle on your car even for 1 day

features.name: Rust Protection
features.description: application of a chemical layer to help reducing rust occurance so your car never gets old

features.name: Internal cleaning
features.description: complete cleaning of all the surfaces inside, seats, dashboard, steering wheel so you feel like a king on a throne

features.name: Windshield Cleaning - Outside
features.description: Using special chemicals to clean your windshield from outside for a spotless view  and long life of the special glass

features.name: Air Pressure Monitoring and Refilling
features.description: checking and refilling of air pressure for your tension free safe journey along with long happy running tyres

features.name: Boot Cleaning
features.description: cleaning the boot space so even your luggage feel the cleanliness and luxury

features.name: Deep Wash in a Shop
features.description: get a much required deep wash in a washing centre with complete internal and external cleaning with internal polish

features.name: Engine Oil and Coolant checking
features.description: checking engine oil and coolant once in 15 days to let know that you are good to go

features.name: Windshield Care - Inside
features.description: Using special chemicals to clean your windshield inside out for a spotless view  and long life of the special glass

features.name: Tyre Polish
features.description: polishing the black beauties so it compliments your chariot along with those shining alloys

features.name: Door Rubber Cleaning
features.description: cleaning of those tight rubber gullys on doors for a less noisy cabin with a premium feel

features.name: New Fragrance
features.description: Select a new fragrance every week from a wide range of our special scents

features.name: Battery Check
features.description: Checking that current giving source for its health through an ammeter so it sparks whenever you need
